channel.title: How can I deploy the files in the build folder to Azure?"
channel.description:
Hello,
I'm curious if anyone has experience deploying files from the build folder to an Azure server. If so, could you please provide some guidance?
Thank you in advance.
Fernando"

item.title: How can I deploy the files in the build folder to Azure?"
item.dc:creator: sheikhzainulabideen4
item.description:
Hello,

I’m curious if anyone has experience deploying files from the build folder to an Azure server. If so, could you please provide some guidance?

Thank you in advance.

Fernando"

item.source: How can I deploy the files in the build folder to Azure?"
